text.title: langchain-memory Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals to a conclusion referencing a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the conversation profile meet the prerequisites (expected_turns set, recall_pattern in {recency,semantic,mixed}, store_backend present)?

conclusion.verdict: Profile incomplete — return error, do not guess.

branch.when: profile.valid == true AND expected_turns < 10 AND entity_focus == true
profile.valid == true AND expected_turns < 10 AND entity_focus == false

conclusion.verdict: Buffer Memory — short conversation, no extraction overhead.

branch.when: profile.valid == true AND expected_turns >= 10 AND recall_pattern == semantic

conclusion.verdict: Vector Memory — semantic retrieval over many turns.

branch.when: profile.valid == true AND expected_turns >= 10 AND recall_pattern != semantic AND expected_turns > 50

conclusion.verdict: Vector Memory — too long for summary, switch to retrieval.

branch.when: profile.valid == true AND expected_turns >= 10 AND recall_pattern != semantic AND expected_turns <= 50
